entries.summary: Phase 5 GUI Module Audit complete. Audited app_gui.py (552 lines). 15 findings (0 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 8 MEDIUM, 5 LOW). Architect caught 4 false positives where explorer misidentified Tkinter self.after() callbacks as background thread execution. Key findings: unvalidated numeric input in settings, god class (552 lines), dead code (get_resource_path, datetime import).

metadata.plan_id: Comprehensive Codebase QA Review — AI-Hardened Edition

lessons_learned: Explorer misidentified Tkinter threading — self.after() schedules on main thread, NOT background thread. Always verify threading patterns by reading the scheduling mechanism, not just the function definition.
GUI code has more LSP noise (conditional imports, PyInstaller attributes) that inflates apparent error count. Distinguish LSP noise from real issues.
God class pattern is the dominant finding in single-file GUI modules — 552 lines in one class is a clear SRP violation.
False positive rate stabilized at ~4 per task — consistent with Phase 3-4 rate.
Dead code (unused imports, unused functions) is easy to detect and validate with grep.
